scope: Codex-class workflow capability relevant to BeMore Mac/iOS/runtime product direction, not Codex internals or branding

capabilities.evidence: Mac Workspace panel, BeMore runtime snapshot, CLI workspace/files commands
Mac Editor panel and CLI file read/write
Mac Terminal panel and CLI run --wait; output is attached to process records
Mac Review panel and CLI diff show
Mac Artifacts/Buddy/receipt areas and CLI artifacts/receipts/buddy commands
Task create/run and receipts exist; automatic fix/retry planner remains human/agent-driven instead of an autonomous planner loop
Runtime protocol names runSubtask, but no product-owned implementation exists yet
File writes and diff review exist; structured patch apply command is not implemented yet
Product sandbox adapter and command runner exist; hardened isolation policy remains a release-hardening item
